---
title: "Example 02: Minimal bs4Dash Application"
subtitle: "Basic bs4Dash application with custom theming"
chapter: "CH10"
category: "example"
number: "EX02"
date-created: "2025-08-23"
date-modified: "2025-08-23"
author: "Claude"
type: "example"
law: "Templates & Examples"
article-number: "Example 2"
related_to:
  - "R090_bs4dash_structure_adherence"
  - "R092_bs4dash_direct_navigation"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
    number-sections: true
---

# Example 2: Minimal bs4Dash Application {#overview}

This example demonstrates a minimal bs4Dash application with custom theming, providing a starting point for dashboard development.

## Section 1: Complete Code {#complete-code}

```r
library(shiny)
library(bs4Dash)

shinyApp(
    ui = dashboardPage(
      freshTheme = create_theme(
        bs4dash_vars(
          navbar_light_color = "#bec5cb",
          navbar_light_active_color = "#FFF",
          navbar_light_hover_color = "#FFF"
        ),
        bs4dash_yiq(
          contrasted_threshold = 10,
          text_dark = "#FFF",
          text_light = "#272c30"
        ),
        bs4dash_layout(
          main_bg = "#353c42"
        ),
        bs4dash_sidebar_light(
          bg = "#272c30",
          color = "#bec5cb",
          hover_color = "#FFF",
          submenu_bg = "#272c30",
          submenu_color = "#FFF",
          submenu_hover_color = "#FFF"
        ),
        bs4dash_status(
          primary = "#5E81AC", danger = "#BF616A", light = "#272c30"
        ),
        bs4dash_color(
          gray_900 = "#FFF", white = "#272c30"
        )
      ),
      options = NULL,
      header = dashboardHeader(
        title = dashboardBrand(
          title = "My dashboard",
          color = "primary",
          href = "https://adminlte.io/themes/v3",
          image = "https://adminlte.io/themes/v3/dist/img/AdminLTELogo.png"
        )
      ),
      sidebar = dashboardSidebar(),
      body = dashboardBody(
        box(status = "danger"),
        box(status = "primary"),
        box(status = "orange")
      ),
      controlbar = dashboardControlbar(),
      title = "DashboardPage"
    ),
    server = function(input, output) { }
  )
```

## Section 2: Key Components {#components}

### Subsection 1: Theme Configuration {#theme}

The application uses `create_theme()` to customize the dashboard appearance:

- **Navbar colors**: Light theme with custom colors
- **YIQ settings**: Contrast threshold for text readability
- **Layout**: Main background color
- **Sidebar**: Dark sidebar with light text
- **Status colors**: Custom primary and danger colors

### Subsection 2: Dashboard Structure {#structure}

- **Header**: Contains brand/logo
- **Sidebar**: Empty (ready for menu items)
- **Body**: Contains example boxes
- **Controlbar**: Right sidebar for settings
- **Title**: Page title for browser tab

## Section 3: Usage {#usage}

This minimal example serves as a template for:
1. Quick prototyping
2. Theme testing
3. Learning bs4Dash structure
4. Starting new projects

---
*This minimal example provides a clean starting point for bs4Dash application development.*
